lines.line: public int Add(int a, int b) { return a + b; }
public int Subtract(int a, int b) { return a - b; }
public int Multiply(int a, int b) { return a * b; }

match.value: public class Calculator public int Add(int a, int b) { return a + b; }public int Subtract(int a, int b) { return a - b; }public int Multiply(int a, int b) { return a * b; }

lines.line: public string Hello(string name) { return "Hello, " + name; }
public string Goodbye(string name) { return "Goodbye, " + name; }

match.value: public class Greeter public string Hello(string name) { return "Hello, " + name; }public string Goodbye(string name) { return "Goodbye, " + name; }public void Reset() { }

public int Multiply(int a, int b) { return a * b; }
